![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mpolish2-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

POLISH

## Exterior / maintenance

### Fine finishing polish for high gloss results.

Q²M Polish is a finishing polish designed to refine paintwork and maximise gloss. It removes light imperfections, haze and micro marring while leaving a clear and high quality finish, making it suitable as a final polishing step.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mpolish_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## An effective polish, designed to leave a hologram free finish and deep gloss.

Q²M Polish focuses on surface refinement rather than heavy defect removal. It improves clarity and gloss while remaining easy to work with, allowing precise control and clean wipe off during the final stages of paint correction.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons37.svg)

LOW DUST 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons46.svg)

NO SILICONES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons42.svg)

NO FILLERS 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mpolish.webp)

CAPACITIES 

120 ML / 1000 ML

Cut 

Finish 

Consumption

10ML/PANEL

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

POLISH

01
Apply Q²M Polish to a polishing pad. 

02
Work the product using a polishing machine of choice at a moderate speed. 

03
Polish until defects are refined and gloss is achieved. 

04
Wipe off residue with a clean microfibre towel. 

05
Prepare the surface for protection if required. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What type of defects does Q²M Polish remove? 

Light imperfections, haze and micro marring.

02
Is it a one step polish? 

It is primarily a finishing polish, not a heavy cut product.

03
Can it be used by hand? 

It is intended mainly for machine polishing.

04
Does it leave fillers behind? 

No, it is designed to leave a clean finish.

05
Is it suitable before coating? 

Yes, it prepares paintwork for protection.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000265158-Q-M-Polish)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
